name: agentdeck
description: Turn an old phone or tablet into a tactile control surface for local AI coding agents.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @agentdeck/protocol && npm run build -w @agentdeck/shared && npm run build -w @agentdeck/server && npm run build -w @agentdeck/client
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @agentdeck/dashboard && npm run build -w @agentdeck/desktop-host
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -k -n DASHBOARD,HOST -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @agentdeck/dashboard" "wait-on tcp:5173 && npm run dev -w @agentdeck/desktop-host"
scripts.package:desktop: npm run build && npm run package -w @agentdeck/desktop-host
